description: Near-timeout VNN-COMP 5x100 hard-case slice for PureSART vs. Standard MILP.
name: table3_vnncomp_hard_cases
notes: This preset encodes the paper's hard-case property IDs 4, 6, 5, 42, 44, 46, and 83 with a 20000s timeout.
The paper's VNN-COMP ERAN 5x100 and 8x100 correspond to the code variants `vnncomp_6x100` and `vnncomp_9x100`, because the code counts the output layer in the architecture label.

runs.label: PureSART on the Table 3 VNN-COMP hard-case slice
Standard MILP on the Table 3 VNN-COMP hard-case slice

title: VNN-COMP near-timeout hard cases
